elements.title: Walter Neuhäusser
elements.contents: ... that architect Walter Neuhäusser designed several shell structures, including a cemetery hall in Schupbach (pictured)?

elements.title: Byzantine attempt to capture Salona
elements.contents: ... that, during the Byzantine attempt to capture Salona, Mundus led a grief-driven attack that routed the Goths after his son was killed on a reconnaissance mission, but also died while pursuing them?

elements.title: Meditation
elements.contents: ... that Edith Maryon's 1910 sculpture Meditation was made in at least three media?

elements.title: became the first team
elements.contents: ... that in 2026 India became the first team to win two consecutive Men's T20 World Cup finals?

elements.title: a 19th-century Chinese poem
elements.contents: ... that a 19th-century Chinese poem exploring gay and lesbian relationships is 1.8 million words long?

elements.title: Ipong Muchlissoni
elements.contents: ... that Ipong Muchlissoni, Sri Wahyuni, and their son all unsuccessfully ran for election to the House of Representatives of Indonesia in 2024?

elements.title: Eugenia
elements.contents: ... that Eugenia is the only Mexico City Metro station to be named after a Mexican woman?

elements.title: an Angry Birds game
elements.contents: ... that an Angry Birds game is based on the Star Wars prequel trilogy?

elements.title: I
elements.contents: ... that "I" won an award for best collaboration in 2015?
